across.clue: To crumble means to break or fall apart into small pieces.
If someone does something likewise, they do the same thing as someone else.
If something is imperial, then it is related to an empire.
At a specific time | At this/that ___ in time
Importance is the quality or state of being important, valuable, or significant.
The Renaissance was a period between the 14th and 17th centuries.
Something that is integral is an important part of the whole.
To insult someone is to say things that will hurt the person’s feelings.
A pigeon is a bird with a plump body.
Imaginary means not real, existing only in the imagination.

down.clue: A brilliant person is very bright or smart.
A bonus is extra money given for good work.
When you interpret something, you find its meaning, often by changing it into a different language.
Medication is medicine or drugs given to people who are sick.
Incapable means not able to do something.
To fascinate someone is to make that person very interested.
A combination is a mixture of different things.
to become worse or to make something worse
Epilepsy is a medical condition that affects the brain and can make someone become unconscious or unable to control their movement for a short time.
A phrase is a group of words that have a particular meaning.
